name: imgix
description: imgix is a real-time image processing and CDN service. It transforms, optimizes, and delivers images via URL parameters -- you append query parameters to any image URL to resize, crop, add text, watermark, and apply effects on the fly.

auth.note: The Management API uses Bearer token auth. The Rendering API uses URL parameters on your imgix source domain (e.g., https://your-source.imgix.net/image.jpg?w=400).

capabilities.name: resize_image
capabilities.description: Resize an image by specifying width, height, or both. Supports fit modes like clip, crop, fill, and scale to control aspect ratio behavior.

capabilities.name: crop_image
capabilities.description: Crop an image to a specific region. Supports focal point cropping, face detection cropping, and entropy-based smart cropping.

capabilities.name: convert_format
capabilities.description: Convert an image to a different output format like WebP, AVIF, PNG, or JPEG. Use auto format to let imgix choose the best format for the client.

capabilities.name: add_text_overlay
capabilities.description: Render text on top of an image with control over font, size, color, alignment, and position. Supports base64-encoded text for special characters.

capabilities.name: add_watermark
capabilities.description: Overlay a watermark image on top of a base image with control over position, size, opacity, and blending mode.

capabilities.name: adjust_quality
capabilities.description: Control the compression quality and file size of the output image. Supports automatic quality optimization based on content analysis.

capabilities.name: apply_effects
capabilities.description: Apply visual effects to an image including blur, sharpen, sepia, grayscale, contrast adjustments, and background removal.

capabilities.name: list_sources
capabilities.description: List all imgix sources in your account via the Management API. Returns source names, domains, and configuration.
